medications.indication_rationale: No fever or infective focus; empirical antibiotics are not indicated and would be inappropriate without evidence of infection.
Not appropriate to initiate via telehealth for a self-limiting panic episode; non-pharmacological grounding is preferred.

behavioural_change_actions.specific_action: Use slow paced breathing now, turn off pathology-app notifications, and avoid re-reading the result tonight.
behavioural_change_actions.rationale: Interrupts the panic-checking cycle driving the adrenergic symptoms.

patient_education_points.point: Your low white-cell count is a stable, harmless variation — it does not mean your immune system is failing, and mild low counts do not put you at high risk of infection.
What matters is a REAL fever. Please get a thermometer. If your temperature reaches 38.0C or you get true shaking chills, go to the emergency department and tell them your white cells run low.
Right now you have no measured fever and no signs of infection, so this is not an emergency. See your GP within a week to review the blood count.

follow_up_plan.what_to_reassess: Confirm stable neutrophil count; consider haematology referral; provide written neutropenic-fever advice.
follow_up_plan.trigger_for_earlier_review: Measured fever >=38.0C, rigors, new infection symptoms, or bleeding/bruising — attend ED.

must_include_items: Distinguish subjective chills from a measured fever and advise obtaining a thermometer
Provide an explicit neutropenic-fever safety-net (ED if >=38.0C or rigors, mention low counts to staff)
Reassure that mild chronic neutropenia is benign and low-risk
acceptable_alternatives: Paced-breathing / grounding for the acute anxiety
errors_of_commission: Dispatching an afebrile anxious patient to ED as presumed sepsis
Prescribing empirical antibiotics or a benzodiazepine remotely
Flat dismissal as anxiety without the fever safety-net
scoring_rubric.passing_threshold_notes: T1 case with a critical safety-net caveat: passing REQUIRES the neutropenic-fever safety-net. Omitting it is a failure even if the rest is reassuring.
